title: UIUX - Executive
description:
Position: UI/UX Designer

Experience: 1-3 Years

Location: Pune (On-Site)

About Amura

Amura Marketing is a next-generation Martech company that delivers end-to-end marketing and sales solutions to leading brands in India. Our approach combines design, engineering, data, and technology to create digital experiences that are visually engaging, user-friendly, and aligned with business outcomes.

This role is adapted from the structure and expectations of your earlier design JD, but refined for a junior-level UI/UX Designer with stronger visual design capability and relevance to the current AI-enabled design environment.

Role Summary


We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer with 1-3 years of experience to join our team in Pune.
The ideal candidate should have a strong foundation in visual design, website and landing page layouting, and basic user experience principles.
This role requires someone who can contribute as a visualiser, meaning the person should be able to convert a creative brief, brand direction, or reference into compelling digital concepts and polished interface designs.
The candidate should be comfortable working on website pages, campaign landing pages, digital assets, and UI layouts, while collaborating with design leads, developers, content teams, and account managers. Familiarity with modern AI-assisted design workflows will be an added advantage.


Key Responsibilities


Visual Design and Creative Execution


Create visually strong and brand-aligned designs for websites, landing pages, microsites, and digital interfaces.

Develop page mockups, section designs, banners, and visual concepts based on project briefs.

Contribute as a visualiser by exploring multiple design directions and converting ideas into polished layouts.

Ensure all designs maintain strong visual hierarchy, typography, colour balance, spacing, and overall composition.


UI/UX Design Support


Prepare wireframes, screen layouts, and interface structures based on business and user requirements.

Apply basic UX principles to ensure clarity, ease of navigation, and usability.

Design layouts that support customer journeys, call-to-action visibility, and responsive behaviour across devices.

Create designs that are responsive, mobile-friendly, and optimised for different screen sizes.

Work under the guidance of senior team members to continuously improve design quality and user experience.


Design Tools and Workflow


Use Figma for wireframing, visual design, prototyping, and collaborative reviews.

Follow established design systems, style guides, and brand guidelines.

Maintain well-structured and organised design files for internal collaboration and development handoff.

Use AI-assisted tools, where relevant, for concept exploration, design ideation, and creative acceleration under team guidance.


Cross-Functional Collaboration


Work closely with UI/UX leads, developers, content teams, and project stakeholders.

Understand project requirements and incorporate feedback in a timely and effective manner.

Support smooth design-to-development handoff by preparing clear and implementation-friendly files.

Participate in design reviews, internal discussions, and project meetings as required.


Quality and Consistency


Ensure consistency in design execution across screens, pages, and digital assets.

Maintain attention to detail in layout structure, content alignment, and responsive design behaviour.

Follow basic accessibility and usability best practices.

Deliver work within timelines and quality expectations.

Required Qualifications


1-3 years of relevant experience in UI design, visual design, web design, or digital creative design.
Strong portfolio demonstrating work in website design, landing pages, campaign layouts, or digital interfaces.
Prior visualiser experience is important for this role.
Good working knowledge of Figma.
Basic understanding of UI/UX principles, responsive design, and digital user journeys.
Good communication skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.


Must-Have Skills


Strong visual design sense with good understanding of typography, layout, spacing, colour, and composition.
Experience in creating website layouts, landing pages, and digital design mockups.
Good understanding of responsive and mobile-friendly design for websites, landing pages, and digital interfaces.
Ability to work as a visualiser and generate creative design directions from a brief.
Good proficiency in Figma.
Familiarity with AI-assisted design tools such as Lovable, Google AI Studio, Claude, or image generation tools.
Basic understanding of UI components, user flows, and screen structure.
Ability to interpret brand guidelines and apply them consistently across designs.
Strong attention to detail and willingness to learn.


Good-to-Have Skills


Knowledge of Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.
Exposure to design systems and reusable UI components.
Basic understanding of HTML/CSS for better coordination with development teams.
Understanding of accessibility-friendly design practices.
Prior experience in agency, digital, or Martech environments.


Preferred Candidate Profile


Creative and visually strong, with a good eye for digital aesthetics.
Able to balance visual appeal with usability and clarity.
Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with multiple projects.
Open to feedback and able to improve designs through iteration.
Interested in learning modern tools, including AI-assisted design workflows.


Share with someone awesome

title: Junior Engineer II, Plant Maintenance
description:
Introduction: A Career at HARMAN Automotive

We’re a global, multi-disciplinary team that’s putting the innovative power of technology to work and transforming tomorrow. At HARMAN Automotive, we give you the keys to fast-track your career.


Engineer audio systems and integrated technology platforms that augment the driving experience.
Combine ingenuity, in-depth research, and a spirit of collaboration with design and engineering excellence.
Advance in-vehicle infotainment, safety, efficiency, and enjoyment


About The Role

The position is expected to be located at Plant. Facilities management - Plans, execute and coordinates the pm activities concerned with equipment selection, installation and commissioning, construction, modification, and maintenance of equipment machinery in industrial plant.

What You Will Do


Operations and Maintenance of utilities systems - HT & LT Systems, UPS systems, HVAC, Air compressors, DG Sets, ups, Nitrogen to support to Production function.
Maintenance of Matl handling equipment’s
FPS Systems, Access controls and CCTV management
Coordination with Sub-contractors for Execution
Execution of New Projects/ Layout Change, New Equipment Installation, MSEB Licensing Statutory compliances
Enhance safety Environment and implementation of safety process / systems
Maintain the KPI - MTTR, MTBF, 3C, 5S
Spares Management
Energy management
Implementing Certification (OSHAS, TS 16949, ISO 50001), EMS, OEM’s Specific certifications
EMS & Haz management systems,
Statutory compliance


What You Need To Be Successful


Diploma / BE in Electrical Engineering 5 to 7 years of experience in Plant engineering function / Utilities systems operation and maintenance
Certification / License: C license / Supervisor License – Issued by Electricity board.


What Makes You Eligible


Be willing to travel up to domestic/International travel.
Be willing to work in office based on up dependencies.


What We Offer


Flexible work environment, allowing for full-time remote work globally for positions that can be performed outside a HARMAN or customer location.
Access to employee discounts on world-class Harman and Samsung products (JBL, HARMAN Kardon, AKG, etc.)
Extensive training opportunities through our own HARMAN University
Competitive wellness benefits
Tuition reimbursement
“Be Brilliant” employee recognition and rewards program.
An inclusive and diverse work environment that fosters and encourages professional and personal development.


You Belong Here

HARMAN is committed to making every employee feel welcomed, valued, and empowered. No matter what role you play, we encourage you to share your ideas, voice your distinct perspective, and bring your whole self with you – all within a support-minded culture that celebrates what makes each of us unique. We also recognize that learning is a lifelong pursuit and want you to flourish. We proudly offer added opportunities for training, development, and continuing education, further empowering you to live the career you want.

About HARMAN: Where Innovation Unleashes Next-Level Technology

Ever since the 1920s, we’ve been amplifying the sense of sound. Today, that legacy endures, with integrated technology platforms that make the world smarter, safer, and more connected.

Across automotive, lifestyle, and digital transformation solutions, we create innovative technologies that turn ordinary moments into extraordinary experiences. Our renowned automotive and lifestyle solutions can be found everywhere, from the music we play in our cars and homes to venues that feature today’s most sought-after performers, while our digital transformation solutions serve humanity by addressing the world’s ever-evolving needs and demands. Marketing our award-winning portfolio under 16 iconic brands, such as JBL, Mark Levinson, and Revel, we set ourselves apart by exceeding the highest engineering and design standards for our customers, our partners and each other.

If you’re ready to innovate and do work that makes a lasting impact, join our talent community today!

Important Notice: Recruitment Scams

Please be aware that HARMAN recruiters will always communicate with you from an '@harman.com', ‘@careers.harman.com’ or ‘harmanglobal.avature.net’ email address. We will never ask for payments, banking, credit card, personal financial information or access to your LinkedIn/email account during the screening, interview, or recruitment process. If you are asked for such information or receive communication from an email address not ending in one of the above email domains about a job with HARMAN, please cease communication immediately and report the incident to us through: harmancareers@harman.com.

HARMAN is proud to be an Equal Opportunity employer. HARMAN strives to hire the best qualified candidates and is committed to building a workforce representative of the diverse marketplaces and communities of our global colleagues and customers. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender (including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an individual with a disability, or other applicable legally protected characteristics. HARMAN attracts, hires, and develops employees based on merit, qualifications and job-related performance.(www.harman.com)

title: Software Engineer(Java)
description:
Required Travel :Minimal

Location: :Pune/gurgaon

Who are we?

Amdocs helps those who build the future to make it amazing. With our market-leading portfolio of software products and services, we unlock our customers’ innovative potential, empowering them to provide next-generation communication and media experiences for both the individual end user and enterprise customers. Our employees around the globe are here to accelerate service providers’ migration to the cloud, enable them to differentiate in the 5G era, and digitalize and automate their operations. Listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market, Amdocs had revenue of $5.00 billion in fiscal 2024. For more information, visit www.amdocs.com

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

In one sentence

The JAVA Specialist works on problems of diverse scope where analysis of data requires evaluation of identifiable factors. Strong knowledge in Java technologies and debugging code is a must-have. Demonstrates good judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions. Networks with senior internal and external personnel in own area of expertise. The specialist works on the migration efforts of critical, industry-class, in-house, or commercial products as well as tooling for use in project work.

What will your job look like?

Essential Duties And Responsibilities


Expert-level Java knowledge and debugging.
Help keep Java libraries in sync by porting code from other technologies.
Extend runtime Java libraries with new functionality, which typically is re-implementing functionality found in legacy systems, but now in a Java environment
Help create custom plugins (mostly in Java) for existing tools, to help with project-specific needs
In-depth understanding of object-oriented concepts
Deliver within the scope of the project, within the scope of a Factory project, while not compromising on quality.
Work closely with team members and clients to achieve desired results.
Thrive in an environment of collaboration and change.
Mentor junior team members on Mainframe migration
Identify and bridge the knowledge gap among team members from different backgrounds, like Java, Mainframe, etc.
Thrive in an environment of collaboration and change.
Learn the Astadia Factory tools to perform mainframe transformations
Expert database development knowledge.
SQL development
Understanding of database concepts
Ability to create/maintain database objects
Query tuning
Database locking
Extend existing conversion tools (e.g. COBOL to Java, JCL to PowerShell, …), by extending their grammars and conversion rules
A plus for the role is some experience with mainframe application technologies (COBOL, CICS, DB2, etc), and the ability to understand the transformation from a legacy code set to a modern code set
Scripts/Python development experience will be an advantage


All you need is...


BE in Computer Science or equivalent work experience.
5+ Years of Development professional experience in Java experience
Excellent written and verbal communication skills
Need to know the differences between Java 8, 17, and 21
Interest in learning about legacy technologies, as the libraries typically implement functions available in these legacy technologies
SQL development.
In-depth understanding of Java OO concepts
Experienced in unit testing, test-driven development, integration testing, and deployment using cloud technologies.
Certifications in any cloud technologies.
Experience with Waterfall and Agile Development Methodologies.


Why You Will Love This Job


You will be challenged to design and develop new software applications.
You will have the opportunity to work in a growing organization, with ever growing opportunities for personal growth.


Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce

title: Junior Engineer
description:
We're looking for a Junior Engineer This role is Office Based, Pune Office

Job Title – Junior Engineer

Job Description – Junior Engineer, Full Stack Developer (Cloud Engineering Team)

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Junior Engineer, Full Stack Developer to join our Cloud Engineering Team. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and .NET / Java, coupled with knowledge/hands-on experience in AWS cloud services, CI/CD pipelines.

In this role, you will design, build, and optimize cloud-native applications and services, ensuring they are scalable, secure, and reliable. You will also collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, including DevOps, Database, Engineering, and Cloud Operations, to deliver solutions that empower our talent management platform.

In this role you will…


Design, develop, and maintain cloud-native web applications using React, Node.js, TypeScript, and .NET / Java.
Implement CI/CD pipelines and ensure smooth delivery through automation and DevOps best practices.
Leverage AWS services (ECS, Lambda, API Gateway, S3, DynamoDB, RDS, Cognito, etc.) to build scalable, secure, and resilient solutions.
Explore and integrate AWS AI/ML capabilities into applications to drive innovation.
Collaborate with cloud engineers, QA, architects, and engineering teams to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions.
Optimize system performance, troubleshoot issues, and ensure adherence to security and compliance standards.
Write and maintain SQL and NoSQL queries, schemas, and stored procedures as required.
Participate in peer code reviews, technical design discussions, and documentation.
Continuously evaluate and adopt new tools, frameworks, and cloud engineering best practices.


Preferred Technical Stack & Tools


Frontend: React.js, TypeScript, JavaScript
Backend: Node.js, .NET (Core/ASP.NET), Java, REST APIs
Database: SQL (PostgreSQL/MySQL), NoSQL (DynamoDB/MongoDB)
Cloud & DevOps: AWS (Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, S3, RDS, DynamoDB), Docker, Git, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, CloudFormation
Collaboration Tools: Jira, Confluence


You Have What It Takes If You Have…


Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field (or equivalent practical experience).
0-2 years of professional experience as a Full Stack Developer.
Strong expertise in React, Node.js, TypeScript, and .NET/Java development.
Knowledge/ hands-on experience building cloud-native applications on AWS.
Knowledge/ hands-on experience with CI/CD pipelines, containerization (Docker), and Infrastructure as Code.
Exposure to AWS AI/ML services and eagerness to expand AI integration capabilities.
Solid understanding of cloud security principles, scalability, and performance optimization.
Strong problem-solving skills, ability to work in a fast-paced global environment, and excellent communication skills.


Our Culture

Spark Greatness. Shatter Boundaries. Share Success. Are you ready? Because here, right now – is where the future of work is happening. Where curious disruptors and change innovators like you are helping communities and customers enable everyone – anywhere – to learn, grow and advance. To be better tomorrow than they are today.

Who We Are

Cornerstone powers the potential of organizations and their people to thrive in a changing world. Cornerstone Galaxy, the complete AI-powered workforce agility platform, meets organizations where they are. With Galaxy, organizations can identify skills gaps and development opportunities, retain and engage top talent, and provide multimodal learning experiences to meet the diverse needs of the modern workforce. More than 7,000 organizations and 100 million+ users in 180+ countries and in nearly 50 languages use Cornerstone Galaxy to build high-performing, future-ready organizations and people today.

As a copywriter, you'll work alongside the art director within the creative department. You'll work from client briefs to conceive, develop and produce effective advertising campaigns. You'll focus on providing the written words (the copy) for an advertising campaign.

title: Commercial Finance Analyst
description:
Who We Are

Addepar is a global data and AI platform empowering investment professionals to turn complex financial information into actionable intelligence. Addepar unifies portfolio, market and client data in a total portfolio view and delivers AI-powered insights within investment and client workflows. More than 1,400 firms in nearly 60 countries use Addepar to manage and advise on nearly $9 trillion in assets. Its open platform integrates with nearly 650 software, data and consulting partners to power end-to-end investment operations across firms of all sizes and complexity. Addepar supports clients worldwide with offices in New York City, Salt Lake City, London, Edinburgh, Pune, Dubai, Geneva and São Paulo.

The Role

We’re expanding our Global Finance Operations team in India and building a shared deal governance model that blends financial approvals, deal quality control, and smooth order-to-invoice execution.

This role combines Finance Deal Desk responsibilities (pricing, ARR validation, non-standard deal support) with Order Management responsibilities (contract review, billing readiness, and handoff accuracy).

You’ll be the operational link between Sales, RevOps, Legal, Accounting, and Billing — ensuring deals are structured correctly, approved efficiently, and processed without errors.

This is an ideal role for someone who is hands-on with fundamentals yet capable of stepping into more complex scenarios as the function grows.

Applicants must have legal authorization to work in the country where this role is based on the first day of employment. Visa sponsorship is not available for this position.

What You’ll Do


Deal Desk Responsibilities
Review and validate ARR, pricing, and deal structures in Salesforce CPQ
Ensure accuracy of multi-year, ramped, tiered, or usage-based pricing
Support senior teammates in reviewing non-standard deal constructs (discounting exceptions, blended rates, complex T&Cs, multi-entity deals)
Collaborate with RevOps and Sales Ops to improve quote accuracy and approval compliance
Partner with Legal on commercial terms that impact billing, invoicing, or financial exposure
Evaluate multi-currency pricing using approved FX frameworks
Support credit checks, threshold-based approvals, and finance policy compliance
Order Management Responsibilities
Review contracts and orders for completeness, accuracy, and compliance with internal policies
Ensure all required documents (quotes, contracts, MSAs, addendums) meet billing and invoicing requirements
Validate billing schedules, start dates, terms, and product configurations prior to order activation
Work closely with the Billing and Accounting teams to prevent setup errors or downstream revenue issues
Manage deal-to-invoice readiness, ensuring seamless handoff from CPQ to ERP
Assist in resolving issues related to customer accounts, PO requirements, tax implications, or entity selection
Maintain clean order hygiene across systems, including proactive updates or corrections
Cross-Functional & Operational
Act as a point of contact for Sales on policy questions, deal setup guidance, or required documentation
Analyze recurring deal/order issues and recommend process improvements
Support internal audits or compliance reviews related to contracts, approvals, and billing readiness
Help build scalable workflows as the global deal volume and complexity grow

Who You Are


Minimum 4+ years of experience in Deal Desk, Revenue Operations, Finance Operations, or Order Management within a SaaS or subscription environment
Strong working knowledge of Salesforce CPQ and NetSuite (or similar quote-to-cash/ERP platforms)
Solid understanding of ARR concepts; familiarity with revenue principles is a plus
Ability to independently manage standard deal reviews while supporting complex or non-standard scenarios
Comfort reviewing billing schedules, contract terms, and operational details with high accuracy
Strong cross-functional communication and the ability to influence Sales, Legal, RevOps, and Accounting partners
Analytical mindset, financial judgment, and strong attention to detail
Ability to work in a global, fast-paced, cross-time-zone environment
Growth mindset — comfortable taking on broader responsibilities as the team scales; experience supporting or guiding junior teammates is a plus
[Plus] Experience with multi-currency or international deal structures
[Plus] Exposure to pricing governance or GTM approval workflows
[Plus] Experience in global finance operations or multinational environments


Important Note: This role requires working from our Pune office 3 days a week (Hybrid work model)

Our Values


Act Like an Owner - Think and operate with intention, purpose and care. Own outcomes.
Build Together - Collaborate to unlock the best solutions. Deliver lasting value.
Champion Our Clients - Exceed client expectations. Our clients’ success is our success.
Drive Innovation - Be bold and unconstrained in problem solving. Transform the industry.
Embrace Learning - Engage our community to broaden our perspective. Bring a growth mindset.


In addition to our core values, Addepar is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We seek to bring together diverse ideas, experiences, skill sets, perspectives, backgrounds and identities to drive innovative solutions. We commit to promoting a welcoming environment where inclusion and belonging are held as a shared responsibility.

We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. Please contact us to request accommodation.

PHISHING SCAM WARNING: Addepar is among several companies recently made aware of a phishing scam involving con artists posing as hiring managers recruiting via email, text and social media. The imposters are creating misleading email accounts, conducting remote “interviews,” and making fake job offers in order to collect personal and financial information from unsuspecting individuals. Please be aware that no job offers will be made from Addepar without a formal interview process. Additionally, Addepar will not ask you to purchase equipment or supplies as part of your onboarding process. If you have any questions, please reach out to ta-operations@addepar.com.

title: Junior Architect (Architecture Projects)
description:
An architecture studio based in Ashok Nagar, Pune- engaged in concept-driven design work and spatial research is hiring a Junior Architect with 0-1 year of experience to support early-stage design development. The practice works on architectural proposals, research-based spatial studies, and experimental design explorations.




Project Typology

Projects undertaken by the studio include:

• Architectural design proposals and built architecture assignments

• Experimental installations and spatial studies

• Research-driven architectural investigations

• Conceptual explorations related to form, systems, and spatial relationships

The Junior Architect will support concept exploration, preparation of drawings, and visual communication of architectural ideas. The role involves working with the design team to develop conceptual proposals, diagrams, and visual material for internal reviews and presentations.




Key Responsibilities

• Assist in architectural concept exploration and early design development

• Support research related to site context, spatial systems, and design strategies

• Prepare drawings, diagrams, and visual material for design discussions

• Develop 3D models and visualisations to support concept presentations

• Assist in preparation of presentation material and project documentation

• Contribute ideas during internal design discussions and reviews

• Maintain organized drawing files and documentation records




Qualifications & Skills

• Bachelor’s degree in Architecture

• 0–1 year of experience in architectural design

• Interest in conceptual design and research-oriented architectural processes

• Ability to approach design problems analytically and creatively

• Basic familiarity with architectural software such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Rhino, or similar tools

• Ability to communicate design ideas through drawings, diagrams, and models

• Good collaboration and communication skills




Work Schedule

Location: Ashok Nagar, Pune

Working days: Monday - Friday (10:00 AM - 6:00 PM)

title: Digital Procurement (Coupa/ Ivalua) - Consultant
description:
Summary

Position Summary

Enterprise Performance

Our Enterprise Performance team is at the forefront of enterprise technology, working across finance, supply chain, and IT operations to support the delivery of holistic performance improvement and digital transformation. We support Deloitte client service teams of strategic advisors and architects, differentiated by our industry depth to help collaborate with leading insights providers and leverage your experience in strategy, process design, technology enablement, and operational services to enable the heart of business solutions.

Position Summary

Level: Consultant or equivalent

As an experienced Consultant at Deloitte Consulting Services, you will be responsible for individually delivering high quality work products within due timelines. Need-basis you will be mentoring and/or directing junior team members/liaising with onsite/offshore teams to understand the functional requirements.

Work you’ll do:

Deloitte is seeking a Digital Procurement Consultant with strong expertise in Sourcing and Procurement, and a thorough understanding of end-to-end Source to Pay (S2P) business processes and technical scenarios. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience customizing both upstream and downstream S2P modules such as Ivalua, Coupa, or Ariba, and will have worked in medium to large landscapes involving multiple ERP systems. Proven experience in large-scale S2P Suite implementation and support projects is essential, along with the capability to independently design new solutions. Experience with integration of S2P Suites and ERP systems is considered an advantage.

The team:

The Enterprise Performance team leverages deep industry knowledge, strong analytical skills, and practical approaches to address clients’ toughest business challenges. Our professionals as part of the Supply Chain Network Operations (SCNO) service line within Enterprise Performance focus on helping organizations achieve sustainable competitive advantage throughout their operations, spanning product development, planning, sourcing, manufacturing, logistics, and distribution. We excel at translating strategic objectives into tangible, measurable outcomes at the operational level. By aligning high-level goals with frontline execution, we ensure our clients realize real value and improved performance across every stage of their supply chain and operations.

Qualifications

Must Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:


3 - 6 years of industry experience on Catalog content management, Strategic Sourcing scenario, Contract Management process, Purchase Process, Invoice to Payment process
Understanding business flow and replicating the process in solutions like Ivalua, Coupa and/or Ariba
Worked on at least three implementation project of the most recent version
Should have run Kick-Off and Requirement Gathering Workshop and should be able to map Business Processes to Coupa.
Good Communication Skills (written and orals)


Good to Have Skills/Project Experience/Certifications:


Experience advising, designing, developing, and delivering technology solutions for procurement business transformation
Experience collaborating with clients on process re-engineering, roadmap assessments, system implementations, reporting, and analytics
Experience managing support engagements, priority-based tickets, SLAs, and root-cause analysis
Solid functional and technical knowledge of Source-to-Pay processes, including ERP integration and SaaS platforms
Prior consulting experience with Ivalua, Coupa, Ariba, Concur, NetSuite, Oracle, or SAP is preferred
Experience being responsible for configuration, integration, testing, and deployment of S2P Suite settings and software demonstrations
Support practice development initiatives and contribute to knowledge management
Excellent communication and facilitation skills; multiple tool certifications preferred


Education:


BE/B.Tech/M.C.A./M.Tech degree or equivalent from accredited university


Location:


Bengaluru/Hyderabad/Pune/Chennai


Shift Timings:


11 AM to 8 PM or 2 PM to 11 PM IST as per business requirements


#CSReferral-FY26

#SCNOFY26Hiring

Our purpose

Deloitte’s purpose is to make an impact that matters for our people, clients, and communities. At Deloitte, purpose is synonymous with how we work every day. It defines who we are. Our purpose comes through in our work with clients that enables impact and value in their organizations, as well as through our own investments, commitments, and actions across areas that help drive positive outcomes for our communities.

Our people and culture

Our inclusive culture empowers our people to be who they are, contribute their unique perspectives, and make a difference individually and collectively. It enables us to leverage different ways of thinking, ideas and perspectives, and bring more creativity and innovation to help solve our clients’ most complex challenges. This makes Deloitte one of the most rewarding places to work.

Professional development

At Deloitte, professionals have the opportunity to work with some of the best and discover what works best for them. Here, we prioritize professional growth, offering diverse learning and networking opportunities to help accelerate careers and enhance leadership skills. Our state-of-the-art DU: The Leadership Center in India, located in Hyderabad, represents a tangible symbol of our commitment to the holistic growth and development of our people. Explore DU: The Leadership Center in India .

Benefits To Help You Thrive

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. Our comprehensive rewards program helps us deliver a distinctly Deloitte experience that helps that empowers our professionals to thrive mentally, physically, and financially—and live their purpose. To support our professionals and their loved ones, we offer a broad range of benefits. Eligibility requirements may be based on role, tenure, type of employment and/ or other criteria. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.

Recruiting tips

From developing a stand out resume to putting your best foot forward in the interview, we want you to feel prepared and confident as you explore opportunities at Deloitte. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte recruiters.

title: Engineer
description:
We are seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Junior Engineer to join our Railway Design Team, specializing in alignment, track, and structural engineering. The role involves assisting in the preparation of railway alignment designs, geometric layouts, trackwork planning, and structural detailing under the guidance of senior engineers. Responsibilities include developing CAD drawings, preparing design reports, coordinating with multidisciplinary teams, supporting site teams with design clarifications, and ensuring compliance with railway standards (Indian Railways, RDSO, AREMA, UIC, or FIDIC). The candidate should possess a basic understanding of the design of civil structures such as bridges, viaducts, and culverts, along with knowledge of geotechnical investigations (GTI) and embankment design for railway formation. Exposure to slab track and ballasted track systems, drainage concepts, and interface requirements will be an added advantage. Strong analytical skills, proficiency in design software (AutoCAD, Civil 3D, STAAD, or similar), and the ability to interpret technical specifications are essential. This role provides excellent opportunities to learn advanced railway engineering practices, gain hands-on project experience, and build a strong foundation for a career in large-scale rail and metro infrastructure projects.

title: Analyst/Senior Analyst (Industrials)
description:
Location

New Delhi

Job Description

Job title: Analyst/Senior Analyst (Industrials)

Company Description

We’re L.E.K. Consulting, a global strategy consultancy working with business leaders to seize competitive advantage and amplify growth. Our insights are catalysts that reshape the trajectory of our clients’ businesses, uncovering opportunities and empowering them to master their moments of truth. Since 1983, our worldwide practice—spanning the Americas, Asia Pacific, and Europe—has guided leaders across all industries, from global corporations to emerging entrepreneurial businesses and private equity investors. Looking for more? Visit

Position Overview

The L.E.K. Capability Network (LCN) is an integrated part of L.E.K. Consulting, collaborating closely with consulting teams in L.E.K.’s worldwide network of offices to support them on their toughest and most impactful assignments.

The Analyst / Senior Analyst at LCN plays a critical role in supporting case teams by leading analytical modules, managing research initiatives, and providing insightful recommendations.

A typical project might involve an in-depth primary research campaign to identify and triage potential experts to speak to in a particular field, before holding discussions with them to discover their insights on a topic. It could involve rigorous secondary research to prove or disprove a client hypothesis, leveraging the full arsenal of L.E.K. toolkits and databases. Or it could mean undertaking a critical analysis to illuminate a pattern from the noise around it, to substantiate a strategic decision. They are expected to take greater ownership of their work, proactively structure analysis, and effectively communicate findings. This role requires strong problem-solving skills, the ability to manage multiple tasks across time zones, and a collaborative mindset to mentor junior analysts and contribute to L.E.K.'s culture. More information can be found at

We are currently hiring for Analyst/Senior Analysts into the LCN, a role which will report into the LCN Team lead/Team manager

Primary Research

Responsibilities will include, but are not limited to:


Manage interview campaign including creating IV guide, expert identification, managing expert networks and other vendors, and manage real-time update
Independently work with consulting staff on projects by sourcing content experts and key opinion leaders (e.g., with LinkedIn, expert networks, cold calling, etc.)
Write solicitations for experts to conduct interviews with case teams, and custom solicitations for key opinion leaders (e.g., referring to papers he / she has published)
Conduct local / international interview campaigns and summarize key takeaways from the interview to help case teams derive strategic conclusions
Extract and curate key insights from interviews to validate or challenge case hypotheses, driving informed decision-making


Secondary research


Own end-to-end secondary research modules, identifying relevant data sources and extracting key insights
Collaborate with teams to identify secondary research resources that address client areas of interest (e.g., journal articles, marketing / industry reports, government publications)
Confirm/disprove case team hypotheses, deriving insights and patterns from unstructured problem statements using publicly available reports, articles, thought pieces, company filings and GenAI
Independently contribute to case teams by applying structured problem-solving techniques to test and validate case hypotheses


Analysis: Modelling / surveys


Manage and deliver end-to-end survey analysis including coding, testing, analysis and curating insights
Co-develop comprehensive models such as market models, revenue models, and cost models to support various due-diligence cases
Utilize Excel, Alteryx, Tableau, and other analytical tools to structure data and create compelling visualizations
Review client data to understand gaps in datasets


Slide preparation and quality control


Design and recommend analytical frameworks to effectively present insights in a clear, accurate, and impactful manner
Develop clear and compelling commentary that extracts actionable insights
Create sophisticated visuals in PowerPoint and Tableau for consulting teams to use in client presentations
Collaborate with L.E.K. Graphic Design team to recommend visually interesting layouts for showing complex data
Review slide formatting for quality control, making layouts consistent and in line with L.E.K. brand standards (e.g., updating L.E.K. IP to current visual standards)


Coaching and mentorship


Provide support and oversight to junior analysts on projects, ensuring they meet project objectives
Coach junior analysts on technical skillsets such as secondary research using databases, effective slide writing and data analysis
Share industry insights and best practices with team members to enhance their skills and knowledge.


Case closure support


Prepare redacted versions of materials for delivery to KM
Prepare PowerPoint release documents for case team to deliver to client
Facilitate access agreements process for teams interacting with investors (e.g., as part of a due diligence)


Qualifications


The ideal candidate will have 3-5 years of relevant experience with a top-tier consulting firm
An undergraduate degree is required
Fair understanding of business concepts and their practical applications
Ability to work on multiple tasks and activities at once and flexibility to re-prioritize
Expert PowerPoint and Excel skills
Strong communication skills, both written and verbal
High attention to detail


Benefits And Perks


L.E.K. offers you the opportunity to work in a hybrid setup
We are among the best paying firms globally
Generous time away
We have Parental leaves (Maternity and Paternity) and flexible work options for new mothers
We provide childcare facilities in Mumbai (Day care / Creche services).
Wellness benefits – Health Insurance, Wellness Apps, Gym reimbursement, etc.

title: Junior Engineer
description:
Amex GBT is a place where colleagues find inspiration in travel as a force for good and – through their work – can make an impact on our industry. We’re here to help our colleagues achieve success and offer an inclusive and collaborative culture where your voice is valued.

What You’ll Do


Troubleshooting skills with Log analysis, Tracing, Heap dump analysis, Performance issues, and debugging.
Responsible for the development, optimization, and maintenance of iPaaS solutions and NetSuite customizations.
Docker, GitHub, Jenkins – create basis pipelines, understanding of Platform as a Service (PaaS) for application hosting.
Knowledge of XML, JSON, YAML, XSD, WSDL
Low-level design documentation – Class, sequence diagrams
Understanding of Static code analysis tools like Sonar, Conducting code reviews.
Demonstrated willingness to learn new technologies and takes pride in how fast they develop working software



What We’re Looking For


Bachelor’s degree in a computer science, information technology, with 1-2yrs of experience in Java, Spring boot, J2EE, Java Script
Must have an understanding of modern Java (JDK 17/21/25+) features such as virtual threads and pattern matching, proficiency in the Spring Boot ecosystem, and exposure to building cloud-native microservices with Docker and Kubernetes.
Must have knowledge of building serverless applications using TypeScript via the AWS Cloud Development Kit (CDK) and the AWS SDK, with exposure to deploying full-stack solutions through AWS Lambda, Amazon DynamoDB, and AWS Amplify.
Exposure to Oracle/DB2/PostgreSQL/Stored procedure/SQL development.
Must be willing and able to work in 2nd shifts (3:00 PM IST to 12:00 AM IST) and occasional weekends as required.
Must be willing to work from Bangalore office location minimum 3 days in a week.
Exposure to object-oriented design and coding skills across a variety of platforms Java/J2EE, SOA/Web Services, Spring Boot framework, REST API, JSON, HTML/HTML5, CSS3, XML, AJAX, jQuery, JavaScript, AngularJS, Selenium, Python and RabbitMQ.



Location

Bangalore, India

The #TeamGBT Experience

Work and life: Find your happy medium at Amex GBT.


Flexible benefits are tailored to each country and start the day you do. These include health and welfare insurance plans, retirement programs, parental leave, adoption assistance, and wellbeing resources to support you and your immediate family.
Travel perks: get a choice of deals each week from major travel providers on everything from flights to hotels to cruises and car rentals.
Develop the skills you want when the time is right for you, with access to over 20,000 courses on our learning platform, leadership courses, and new job openings available to internal candidates first.
We strive to champion Inclusion in every aspect of our business at Amex GBT. You can connect with colleagues through our global INclusion Groups, centered around common identities or initiatives, to discuss challenges, obstacles, achievements, and drive company awareness and action.
And much more!



All applicants will receive equal consideration for employment without regard to age, sex, gender (and characteristics related to sex and gender), pregnancy (and related medical conditions), race, color, citizenship, religion, disability, or any other class or characteristic protected by law.

Click Here for Additional Disclosures in Accordance with the LA County Fair Chance Ordinance.

Furthermore, we are committed to providing reasonable accommodation to qualified individuals with disabilities. Please let your recruiter know if you need an accommodation at any point during the hiring process. For details regarding how we protect your data, please consult the Amex GBT Recruitment Privacy Statement.

What if I don’t meet every requirement? If you’re passionate about our mission and believe you’d be a phenomenal addition to our team, don’t worry about “checking every box;" please apply anyway. You may be exactly the person we’re looking for!

title: HR Generalist
description:
HR Generalist (HR Operations & Payroll - SaaS Environment)

Experience: 1 – 2 years

About The Role

We are looking for a proactive HR Generalist who can independently manage recruitment, payroll coordination, and HRMS operations. This role requires someone comfortable taking ownership in a fast-paced SaaS environment and driving HR processes with minimal supervision.

Key Responsibilities


Recruitment & Hiring
Manage end-to-end recruitment for junior to mid-level roles
Source candidates through LinkedIn, job portals, and other channels
Conduct initial screenings and coordinate interviews
Ensure a smooth and positive candidate experience
Payroll & HR Operations
Own and manage monthly payroll inputs, validations, and coordination
Manage attendance, leave tracking, and employee records
Ensure accurate and timely HR data management
Handle the complete employee lifecycle (onboarding to exit formalities)
HRMS & SaaS HR Management
Independently manage HRMS, especially Zoho People
Maintain and optimize employee data, workflows, and reports
Identify process gaps and drive improvements using HR tech
Ensure data accuracy and compliance through HR systems
Employee Engagement & Support
Act as the first point of contact for employee queries
Support and execute engagement initiatives
Help maintain a positive and structured work environment
HR Processes & Compliance
Ensure adherence to company policies and HR processes
Maintain documentation and compliance records
Support audits and HR reporting


Requirements


Bachelor’s degree in HR, Business Administration, or related field
1 – 2 years of relevant HR experience
Hands-on experience with Zoho People (mandatory)
Working knowledge of payroll processes
Strong communication and coordination skills


Preferred Skills


Experience in a SaaS/startup environment
Familiarity with HR analytics/reporting
Ability to manage responsibilities independently
Proactive, detail-oriented, and solution-driven mindset


What We Offer


High ownership and hands-on exposure across HR functions
Fast-paced, growth-oriented work environment
Opportunity to build strong expertise in HR operations and systems

title: Junior Full Stack Developer
description:
Job Description – Junior Full Stack Developer

Department: Technology & Digital / Global Business Solutions

Location: Bangalore, India

Reports To: Janes Beets, Application Manager, IT

Job Purpose

The Junior Full Stack Developer contributes to the design, development, and maintenance of internal business applications used across Epiroc. The role supports product teams in building secure, scalable, and user‑friendly digital solutions for sourcing applications and collaborates closely with senior developers to ensure high‑quality delivery.

Key Responsibilities

Software Development


Develop and maintain web applications across the full stack using modern frameworks and tools.
Implement front‑end features using build tooling such as Vite, Webpack, Angular CLI, or React build pipelines (proficiency in at least one required).
Build and maintain ASP.NET / C# back‑end services and REST APIs.


Security & Identity


Integrate secure authentication and authorization using Azure AD / SSO (OAuth2/OIDC, tokens, scopes, consent).


Cloud & DevOps


Contribute to application and infrastructure automation using Azure and Infrastructure‑as‑Code practices.


Agile Collaboration


Participate in Jira Sprints, daily standups, sprint planning, and other Agile ceremonies.
Work proactively, manage time effectively, and keep stakeholders informed.


Teamwork & Learning


Collaborate through pair‑programming and code reviews.
Seek guidance from Senior Developers and remain open to continuous learning and feedback.


Experience

Required Qualifications


2–3 years of hands‑on software development in a full‑stack or front‑end focused role.


Technical Skills


Frontend build tooling: Vite, Webpack, Angular CLI, React (at least one required; familiarity with several is a plus).
Back‑end: ASP.NET / C#, REST API development.
Authentication & Authorization: Azure AD / SSO, OAuth2/OIDC.
Exposure to Azure and Infrastructure‑as‑Code concepts.
Knowledge of API & EDI Integrations is advantageous


Methodology & Tools


Working knowledge of Jira, Agile/Scrum ways of working.


Soft Skills


Strong communication and stakeholder‑management skills.
Ability to work independently with accurate time management.
Curiosity, willingness to learn, and openness to feedback.


Education


Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.


It all starts with people. The world needs metals and minerals for the energy transition and our cities and infrastructure must be developed to serve a growing population. To succeed, we need to speed up the shift towards more sustainable mining and construction industries. We at Epiroc accelerate this transformation, together with customers and business partners in more than 150 countries, by developing and providing innovative and safe equipment, digital solutions, and aftermarket support.

All new thinkers are welcome. We are looking for those who want to develop, grow, and dare to think new. In Epiroc we attract, develop, and retain diverse talent valuing authenticity and unique perspectives, driving our spirit of innovation. We foster an inclusive culture where diversity isn't just a goal but a part of our values and way of working. This is how we do business for a sustainable future.  Learn more at www.epiroc.com

title: Junior JavaScript Developer - Remote Work
description:
At BairesDev®, we've been leading the way in technology projects for over 15 years. We deliver cutting-edge solutions to giants like Google and the most innovative startups in Silicon Valley.




Our diverse 4,000+ team, composed of the world's Top 1% of tech talent, works remotely on roles that drive significant impact worldwide.




When you apply for this position, you're taking the first step in a process that goes beyond the ordinary. We aim to align your passions and skills with our vacancies, setting you on a path to exceptional career development and success.




Junior JavaScript Developer at BairesDev




As a Junior JavaScript Developer at BairesDev, you will work on developing and maintaining web applications using JavaScript and related technologies. You'll collaborate with experienced developers to implement features, fix bugs, and enhance web solutions while growing your skills in modern JavaScript frameworks and libraries.




What You Will Do:




- Develop and maintain web applications using JavaScript and related technologies.

- Implement responsive user interfaces with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks.

- Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code following best practices.

- Collaborate with team members on code reviews and problem-solving.

- Debug issues and optimize web application performance.

- Learn and apply modern JavaScript frameworks and libraries.




What we are looking for:




- 1+ year of experience with JavaScript development.

- Good understanding of basic algorithms and data structures.

- Familiarity with HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design.

- Basic knowledge of version control systems, preferably Git.

- Ability to solve problems effectively and learn new technologies quickly.

- Good level of English.




How we do make your work (and your life) easier:




- 100% remote work (from anywhere).

- Excellent compensation in USD or your local currency if preferred

- Hardware and software setup for you to work from home.

- Flexible hours: create your own schedule.

- Paid parental leaves, vacations, and national holidays.

- Innovative and multicultural work environment: collaborate and learn from the global Top 1% of talent.

- Supportive environment with mentorship, promotions, skill development, and diverse growth opportunities.




Apply now and become part of a global team where your unique talents can truly thrive!

title: Apprentice - Learning & Development
description:
NATS (National Apprenticeship Training Scheme) is our structured Apprenticeship Program aimed at providing hands-on learning opportunities only for fresh graduates / post graduates (Eligible Batch FY'21-FY'25) helping them build industry-ready skills & kick start their career with us.

Through this program, we’re investing in early talent by offering them mentorship & a strong foundation to grow with us .




Role Overview

We are looking for an enthusiastic and detail‐oriented Learning & Development (L&D)

Administrator to support the smooth running of L&D programs. This entry‐level role will focus

on managing data, training logistics, LMS administration, vendor coordination, and mandatory

training processes.




Key Responsibilities

Data Management: Collect data from stakeholders and prepare simple dashboards and review decks.
Training Logistics: Organize invites, logistics, meeting links, and feedback collection for in‐person and virtual programs.
L&D Communications: Share program updates and create basic visuals using Canva.
LMS Administration: Support backend tasks on the LMS, conduct monthly audits, and upload new courses.
Vendor & Finance Support: Assist with PR/PO requests, vendor onboarding, and payment tracking.
Mandatory Training: Share weekly reports and manage LMS updates for mandatory courses.




Skills & Qualifications

0-1 year experience, preferably in HR.
Basic knowledge of MS Excel and comfort with digital platforms.
Willingness to learn LMS tools and online learning platforms (Coursera, LinkedIn Learning, Udemy etc.).
Familiarity with Canva or interest in learning simple design tools.
Strong attention to detail and ability to stay organized.
Eagerness to learn and grow within the L&D function.
Proactively proposes actionable fixes rather than just reporting problems.

title: Investment Banking Analyst
description:
Investment Banking Analyst (Graduates and Experienced Hires) - Bengaluru

Please apply to Mumbai on our separate vacancy if that is closer to your location







Our Client

Our subsidiary CF Invest, is a dedicated recruitment firm focused on positions in the investment sector.




We are recruiting on behalf of our client, one of the bulge bracket bank and pre-eminent investment banks.




This tier one firm works with us to select the highest calibre talent in the global markets at entry and experienced entry level across their global offices on an ongoing basis through the first half of each year, with the view of onboarding immediately or upon graduation.




Our client is looking for two professionals to join their Investment Banking team in Bengaluru as an Analyst and use their skills and ideas to make an impact on the success of the bank. You will either be placed in their FIG, TMT or Energy Group or possibly another division as they also seek cross industry including but not limited to Industrials, Healthcare and Consumer.




The role requires talent to advise clients on various financial transactions, including mergers and acquisitions, equity/equity-linked and debt financings, joint ventures, restructurings, and financial investments.







Your Focus

As an Investment Banking Analyst, your focus is on supporting clients through complex capital markets and advisory transactions, including mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising. You will work closely with senior bankers to analyse opportunities, structure transactions, and help clients make informed strategic decisions.




The role is execution-driven and detail-intensive. You will build and maintain financial analyses, support transaction execution, and contribute to client materials used in live deals. You will also help assess risk, ensure adherence to regulatory and compliance requirements, and maintain the highest standards of accuracy, judgement, and professionalism.




This role suits someone who is analytically rigorous, commercially aware, and motivated by working at pace on high-stakes transactions. You will be expected to take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with colleagues and clients, and contribute meaningfully to deal delivery in a demanding, regulated environment.







Responsibilities

Support the execution of investment banking transactions, including M&A, capital raising, and strategic advisory mandates
Build and maintain detailed financial models and analyses to evaluate transactions and strategic options
Prepare client-facing materials, including pitch decks, information memoranda, and transaction documentation
Conduct company, industry, and market research to support deal origination and execution
Assist senior bankers in coordinating transaction workstreams and managing timelines
Support due diligence processes, including data analysis and coordination with internal and external stakeholders
Contribute to client development activities through research, analysis, and preparation of marketing materials
Assess transaction-related risks and support adherence to regulatory, compliance, and internal control requirements
Maintain high standards of accuracy, organisation, and confidentiality across all work
Work effectively with colleagues across banking, markets, legal, risk, and compliance teams




This role is about supporting the execution of complex investment banking transactions and helping clients make informed strategic and capital decisions.




You can absorb detailed financial and commercial information quickly, analyse companies, transactions, and market conditions with rigour, and form clear, well-reasoned conclusions. You approach problems with structure and discipline, and you are comfortable working under pressure as deals progress and priorities evolve.







Minimum Qualifications




Graduate – Analyst

Bachelor’s degree ideally in Finance, Economics, Accounting, Business, or a related discipline. We accept also individuals from any degree, especially those numerate based
Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to produce clear client-ready materials
High attention to detail and strong organisational skills
Ability to work effectively under pressure and manage multiple priorities
Sound judgement and a strong understanding of risk, compliance, and regulatory expectations
We consider any degree or subject and although your grade indicates your ability to absorb data and apply it, your degree grade does not influence your chance of applying to us and being interviewed.







Process

This application shall be open until we reach a cap of applicants, so please apply early. We are hiring for our client across their key global markets.




Be sure to Follow Us on LinkedIn for updates on this vacancy and others: https://www.linkedin.com/company/cfcorp




Your first step is to apply with your LinkedIn profile and CV. We do not need a covering letter. Due to the volume of applications we receive, we are unfortunately unable to provide individual feedback.







Reward Structure

Analyst annual base salary of 125,000 and up to 150,000 United States Dollars depending on experience. Your salary will be paid in Indian Rupees and bonus in USD
Bonus program of on-target bonus of 50% of base salary and up to 125% for high-achievers
Relocation is provided by the company

title: Full Stack Developer (React & Node )
description:
Your potential, unleashed.




India’s impact on the global economy has increased at an exponential rate and Deloitte presents an opportunity to unleash and realize your potential amongst cutting edge leaders, and organizations shaping the future of the region, and indeed, the world beyond.

At Deloitte, your whole self to work, every day. Combine that with our drive to propel with purpose and you have the perfect playground to collaborate, innovate, grow, and make an impact that matters.




What impact will you make?




Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. As the undisputed leader in professional services, Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential

Deloitte is where you’ll find unrivaled opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.




The Team




Deloitte Digital has created a new model for a new age: the creative digital consultancy. We're transforming the digital journey in a way an agency or traditional consultancy alone cannot–now leaders across their entire organization can come to one place to have their ambitions brought to life. We combined the creative and digital capabilities of our studios and the broad reach of an advertising agency with the technical experience, deep business strategy, and relationships of one of the world's largest consultancy to create something that is so much more than the sum of its parts. We can help you imagine bigger and scale as your business grows. Learn more about Digital




Work you’ll do







Role: Full Stack Software Engineer (React & Node.js)




Designation: Senior Consultant

Location: Bangalore

Notice period: Immediate Joiner

Education: B. Tech




Position Overview




The Full Stack Software Engineer will be responsible for designing, developing, and operating scalable, secure, and high-performance web applications for enterprise platforms. This role focuses on building modern full-stack systems using React for front-end development and Node.js for backend services, while leveraging cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure.

As part of the Enterprise Services – Data & AI organization, the engineer will contribute to platforms that power AI-enabled workflows and enterprise applications across the organization. The role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams including architects, product owners, security teams, and engineers to build reliable, enterprise-grade solutions.




Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain full-stack web applications using React.js for front-end and Node.js for back-end services.
Build scalable and secure enterprise applications using modern JavaScript frameworks and microservices architecture.
Develop and integrate RESTful APIs and enterprise services to enable AI-powered workflows and enterprise platforms.
Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms such as AWS and Azure, ensuring performance, reliability, and scalability.
Design and optimize SQL database schemas, queries, and data storage solutions.
Implement CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure automation using tools such as GitHub Actions and Terraform.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver solutions aligned with Agile and DevOps methodologies.
Write clean, testable, well-documented code to support maintainability and long-term platform development.
Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and agile ceremonies.
Implement best practices related to security, compliance, and enterprise software standards.
Contribute to AI-enabled systems, including technologies such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), NLP pipelines, and automation workflows.
Support enterprise platforms with capabilities such as identity-aware APIs, observability, and edge services.




Required Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field.
Good to have Experience in Python
5+ years of professional experience in software development (or 3+ years with an advanced degree).
Strong experience building full-stack web applications.
Proficiency in React.js and modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks.
Backend development experience with Node.js and RESTful APIs.
Experience working with SQL databases and data modeling.
Experience deploying applications on AWS and/or Azure cloud platforms.
Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, DevOps practices, and version control systems such as GitHub.
Strong understanding of responsive front-end design and scalable backend architecture.




Preferred Qualifications:

Experience with Docker and containerization technologies.
Familiarity with Kubernetes or container orchestration platforms.
Exposure to AI technologies such as RAG, NLP, LLMs, or agent-based workflows.
Experience building or consuming secure, identity-aware APIs.
Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to navigate ambiguity and deliver end-to-end solutions.
Understanding of Agile and DevOps best practices.
Curiosity and willingness to explore complex enterprise software platforms and emerging technologies.




How you’ll grow




At Deloitte, our professional development plan focuses on helping people at every level of their career to identify and use their strengths to do their best work every day. From entry-level employees to senior leaders, we believe there’s always room to learn. We offer opportunities to help build world-class skills in addition to hands-on experience in the global, fast-changing business world. From on-the-job learning experiences to formal development programs at Deloitte University, our professionals have a variety of opportunities to continue to grow throughout their career. Explore Deloitte University, The Leadership Centre.







Benefits

At Deloitte, we know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and offer employees a broad range of benefits. Learn more about what working at Deloitte can mean for you.




Our purpose

Deloitte is led by a purpose: To make an impact that matters.

Every day, Deloitte people are making a real impact in the places they live and work. We pride ourselves on doing not only what is good for clients, but also what is good for our people and the

Communities in which we live and work—always striving to be an organization that is held up as a role model of quality, integrity, and positive change. Learn more about Deloitte's impact on the world




Recruiter tips

We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared and confident. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research: know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: Associate Engineer, NOC
description:
hackajob is collaborating with Scale Computing to connect them with exceptional professionals for this role.

Who We Are

Acumera is now Scale Computing! Scale Computing is a global leader in edge computing, hyperconverged infrastructure, and managed networking solutions. We deliver innovative, secure, andscalable technology that powers critical operations worldwide.

About The Role

Trainee/Associate Engineer will oversee daily operation of support desk functions that includes taking calls as first level support, entering the reported problems in the ticketing system, solving user problems, proper escalation of open problems and dealing with the customers. Will also participate in preventative maintenance, troubleshooting, configuring and providing technical

support for end-users.

Great Candidates Will Look Like This

A team player who can work well within the team and collaborate cross-functionally, especially in a remote environment.

An excellent communicator who is efficient and effective with customers and colleagues via instant messages, email, video conferencing and in-person interactions.

Enjoy troubleshooting and problem-solving analytically.

Essential duties and responsibilities include the following: (Other duties may be assigned.)

Provide helpful and professional assistance to customers via phone, email and tickets.

Create or update support tickets as required for phone calls.

Document all calls, actions, and any relevant information in ticket notes.

Handle tickets created by customers via email.

Follow up on existing tickets proactively and within specified time frames.

Resolve or escalate tickets in a timely manner, within SLA guidelines.

Interact with other departments and teams, collaborating on tickets or solutions.

Evaluate customers’ needs and determine the appropriate action.

Troubleshoot complex technical issues with customers via phone.

Understand and follow security and other guidelines for customers’ accounts.

Process voicemails, creating or updating support tickets as necessary.

Write and send customized email responses to customers for specific situations.

Understand and adhere to Scale Computing policies and procedures.

Place outbound calls to resolve internally-detected issues.

Be professional and courteous at all times, especially when speaking or conversing with customers.

Technical Requirements

Knowledge of at least some of the following:

General computer systems

PCs, laptops, mobile devices.

Current and recent Operating Systems

Windows, Mac OS, Linux

Routing Protocols and concepts

Static and Dynamic routing, Distance, Priority, routing table, Default Gateway

Switching Protocols and concepts

VLAN, Trunks and link bonding, Spanning Tree and RSTP, MAC Address table,

ARP.

Networking Protocols and concepts

TCP, UDP, DHCP, DNS, VPN, ICMP, TELNET, SSH FTP, HTTP(s), IPSEC, SSL,etc.

Network troubleshooting tools such as PING, TRACEROUTE, NSLOOKUP, IPCONFIG, etc.


OSI Model – Advanced understanding of layers 1-4
Subnetting and Supernetting
Firewall rules and policies, Access Lists


Deep understanding of technical concepts within networking environments as well as security, risk and compliance.

Entry Level knowledge of Switches, Routers, Firewalls, and Networking in general is required. Must be detail-oriented and must be able to work well in a team environment.

Reporting Structure

Reports to Tier 1 Manager - NOC.

Education And Experience

Bachelor’s degree (B.E./B.Tech/BCA) in a technical domain such as Computer Science, Telecommunication, Electronics & Communication, Information Technology, or a related field.

Minimum experience in the networking domain is preferred. (0-2 years)

Experience Working In Helpdesk Or Technical Support Is Preferred.

Industry certifications like CompTIA Network+, CCNA, CCNP, JNCIA, Wireshark, etc. are preferred.

Perks of Acumera

Group medical insurance.

Paid company holidays.

Casual dress code

Cab facilities for employees working in shifts.

Fully stocked snacks at office.

Vibrant and Inclusive Workplace Atmosphere.

Flexible work environment and an opportunity to grow as we grow.

Scale Computing is an equal-opportunity employer. All final candidates will be subject to a pre-employment background check.
